allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-PnpDevice -Class Ports -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, Status, InstanceId -AutoSize")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p\) for p in data.get\(''''packages'''',data.keys\(\)\) if ''''st7789'''' in str\(p\).lower\(\) or ''''ST7789'''' in str\(p\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(item[''''path'''']\) for item in data.get\(''''items'''',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f[''''name'''']\) for f in data]")
Bash(py -3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f[''''name'''']\) for f in data]")
